metadata.description: Domain-specific AI skills for the Valkey ecosystem

plugins.name: valkey

plugins.description: Valkey operations - deployment, monitoring, security, persistence, upgrades, troubleshooting

plugins.description: Valkey ecosystem - modules (JSON, Bloom, Search), managed services, monitoring tools, Docker, Kubernetes

plugins.name: glide-mq
